eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Texas; at 4:11 PM on JUL 19, 2026 Effective until 7:11 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Local AMBER Alert: Missing/Possibly Abducted Child from Katy, TX. Missing child is Edward Hall, 5 year old black male last seen wearing black and blue Elmo tshirt and black shorts. Call Fort Bend County Sheriffs Office with information. If seen call 9 1 1. (Paste EAS Message Here). 
To view all active alerts, click here: https://txsubscribealerts.dps.texas.gov/alerts
